title: (Bullish Signal) EXAS, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on April 29, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that EXAS's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 298 similar cases, 263 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 88%. Current price $132.80 crossed the support line at $131.15 and is trading between $148.15 resistance and $131.15 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/29/21 - 04/29/21, the price experienced a +11% Uptrend. During the week of 04/22/21 - 04/29/21, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/0or00fn38cw61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=05823e677a270f9cec67535bddc753dcd53e73f2

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 22, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on EXAS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 72 of 91 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for EXAS just turned positive on March 31, 2021. Looking at past instances where EXAS's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 39 of 50 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

The 10-day Moving Average for EXAS crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on April 28, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 9 of 12 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

Following a +7.16% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where EXAS advanced for three days, in 279 of 336 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 263 of 298 cases where EXAS Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 88%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10858072-exact-sciences-s-exas-133-02-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-april-29-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
